risks.description:
The U.S. women's national team (USWNT) won't compete in the World Cup until next summer in Brazil, but the players will still enjoy a nice payday from what their male counterparts just did in the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

risks.title: 'Cannot remain silent': Egypt demands FIFA investigate World Cup referees
risks.description: Egypt remains incensed at French referee Francois Letexier after his performance in the Round of 16 clash against Argentina at the FIFA World Cup.

risks.title: Why USMNT will share half of $12.8 million World Cup payout with women’s team
risks.description: The USMNT’s woes continue even after their embarrassing elimination from the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Belgium gave the USMNT a thrashing during their Round of 16 battle, with a 4-1 win over the hosts, as it exposed some major flaws in their current squad.

risks.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani takes a swipe at Lionel Messi’s Argentina, drops ‘robbed’ verdict on Egypt
risks.description: The Round of 16 battle between Argentina and Egypt caused a major uproar among soccer fans. Mohamed Salah and Egypt looked all set to knock Argentina out of the 2026 FIFA World Cup as they held a 2-0 lead in their Round of 16 match.

risks.description: The Portugal star said the now-iconic gesture came naturally after he scored a goal at Miami's Hard Rock Stadium.

risks.title: 3 England players miss training ahead of Norway World Cup clash
risks.description:
Three England players were absent from training on Wednesday ahead of Saturday's 2026 FIFA World Cup quarter-final against Norway.

risks.title: Does video show drone light show honoring Cristiano Ronaldo?
risks.description: A video authentically shows a drone light show on Portugal's Madeira Island showing a figure representing soccer star Cristiano Ronaldo waving goodbye following his announcement that the 2026 FIFA World Cup would be his last.
